query: List the five municipalities in Finnmark county with the highest number of buildings in 200-year flood zones, sorted by count descending.

1.description: get Finnmark county geometry and fylkesnummer

2.description: get all municipalities with geometry and kommunenummer/kommunenavn

3.description: select municipalities within Finnmark county using geometries

4.description: get flomareal rows with gjentaksintervall = 200 and geometry

5.description: select 200-year flood areas intersecting Finnmark county geometry (reduced set)

6.description: get buildings with kommunenummer and representasjonspunkt geometry

7.description: select buildings that intersect the reduced 200-year flood areas

8.description: count distinct buildings per municipality (kommunenummer) and include kommunenavn

9.description: sort municipalities by building count descending

10.description: return top 5 municipalities in Finnmark by buildings in 200-year flood zones
